---
title: "Neural Art"
description: "CNN for painting's art style classification"
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://github.com/pablo-mas/neural-art
    # orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
    affiliation: Student at Le Wagon 
date: 02-14-2023
categories: [Python, Deep Learning, Computer Vision] # self-defined categories
image: neural-art.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---
